ref: Don't you know by now that I am not talking to you about bread? Watch out for the yeast of the Pharisees and Sadducees!
text: Kɛ ji lɛ kɛɛ ne nyɛ nɛ́ nya kaa pi abolo he je nɛ i ngɛ nyɛ dee ke nyɛ hɛ nɛ hi nyɛ he nɔ ngɛ Farisifohi kɛ Sadukifo ɔmɛ a ma sasɛ ɔ he ɔ?”
translated: And are you not then the Christ? Tell us.

ref: Someone may say, “Here is the Messiah!” or “There he is!” But don't believe it.
text: “Lɛ be ɔ mi ɔ, ke nɔ ko de nyɛ ke: ‘Oʼɛ, Kristo ɔ ngɛ hiɛ ɔ loo hiɛ ɔ’ ɔ, nyɛ ko he ye.
translated: When they brought him out, they said to him: 'Behold, the King of the Jews' and they crucified him.

ref: As soon as they got out of the boat, the people recognized Jesus.
text: Nɛ benɛ a je lɛ ɔ mi ɔ, amlɔ ɔ ni ɔmɛ yo Yesu,
translated: When we were still sinners, Christ died for us

ref: The chief priests and leaders answered, “He will kill them in some horrible way. Then he will rent out his vineyard to people who will give him his share of grapes at harvest time.”
text: A de lɛ ke: “E ma kpata kikɛmɛ a nimli yayami nɛ ɔmɛ a hɛ mi butuu, nɛ e maa ngɔ wain ngmɔ ɔ ngɔ ha huli kpahi apaa humi, nihi nɛ kɛ yiblii ma ba ha lɛ ngɛ be nɛ sa mi.”
translated: And then he said: “If you want to know the secret of the gods, you must first learn to listen to the whispers of the trees, and then you will understand the language of the wind, and finally you will be able to hear the voice that speaks directly to your soul.”

ref: But if you don't forgive others, your Father will not forgive your sins. Worshiping God by Going without Eating
text: Se ke nyɛɛ kɛ nihi a tɔmihi pɛ́ mɛ ɔ, nyɛ tsɛ ɔ hu kɛ nyɛ tɔmi ɔmɛ be nyɛ pae.” Hwɔhami he nitsɔɔmi
translated: If you are not a farmer, you will not know the value of a farmer, you will only know the value when you become one and face the challenges.
